title: EdgeCacheEntry
description: KV value written by PromoteToEdgeCacheAction and OgEdgeWritethrough (services/edge_cache/) and served by the edge Worker. Key format: cache:{domain}:{short_code}, domain lowercased with no www prefix. Absent optionals are omitted, not null (EdgeCacheEntry.to_kv_json). Both sides are tested against fixtures.json — change entry shape, key format, fixtures, Python model, and Worker parsing only in lockstep.

type.description: Entry discriminator. 'redirect': serve Location to everyone (+ og_html to preview bots when present). 'og_only': serve og_html to preview bots, everyone else passes through to origin. Consumers MUST passthrough unknown types (forward compatibility).

url.description: Absolute destination URL to redirect to. Required for type=redirect, absent for og_only.

status.description: HTTP redirect status for the redirect branch. Always 302 today.

og_html.description: Prerendered meta_preview.html served (200, text/html) to link-preview crawlers. Final HTML string, no template syntax.
